revision.text:
'''丁未'''（ひのとひつじ、ていび）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて44番目で、前は[[丙午]]、次は[[戊申]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は火、[[十二支]]の五行は土で、[[五行思想#相生|相生]]（火生土）である。
==丁未の年==
==丁未の日== ===[[選日]]=== 丁未の日は[[天一天上]]の15日目である。

revision.comment: Programmatically generating so that if this gets imported to wikipedia as a draft, the bot will attribute it to Immanuelle and send them g6 warnings
revision.text: #redirect[[en:丁未]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''丁未'''（ひのとひつじ、ていかのひつじ、ていび）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの44番目で、前は[[丙午]]、次は[[戊申]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[丁]]は陰の[[火]]、[[十二支]]の[[未]]は陰の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（火生土）である。
==丁未の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って47が余る年が丁未の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''丁未の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[47年]] *[[107年]] *[[167年]] *[[227年]] *[[287年]] *[[347年]] *[[407年]] *[[467年]] *[[527年]] *[[587年]] *[[647年]] *[[707年]] *[[767年]] *[[827年]] *[[887年]] *[[947年]] | *[[1007年]] *[[1067年]] *[[1127年]] *[[1187年]] *[[1247年]] *[[1307年]] *[[1367年]] *[[1427年]] *[[1487年]] *[[1547年]] *[[1607年]] *[[1667年]] *[[1727年]] *[[1787年]] *[[1847年]] *[[1907年]] *[[1967年]] | *[[2027年]] *[[2087年]] *[[2147年]] *[[2207年]] *[[2267年]] *[[2327年]] *[[2387年]] *[[2447年]] *[[2507年]] *[[2567年]] *[[2627年]] *[[2687年]] *[[2747年]] *[[2807年]] *[[2867年]] *[[2927年]] *[[2987年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[587年]]の[[蘇我氏]]と[[物部氏]]の戦いを[[丁未の乱]]という。
==丁未の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[6月]]が丁未の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小暑]]から[[立秋]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==丁未の日== ===選日=== 丁未の日は[[天一天上]]の15日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ひのとひつし}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:丁未]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:丁未]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:丁未]]

==丁未の日== ===選日=== 丁未の日は[[天一天上]]の15日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|ひのとひつし}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Fire Goat-qq]] [[Category:丁未]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:丁未]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:丁未]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Fire Goat-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Fire Goat]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Fire Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Fire Goat]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Fire Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Fire Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[sn:Yin Fire Goat]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[ja:丁未]] [[ja:Yin Fire Goat]]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q905292]] Wikidata name: Yin Fire Goat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Goat|kanji=丁未|romaji=hinoto hitsuji|onyomi=teibi|p=dīwèi|w=ting-wei|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ weɪ̯|y=deng1 mei6|j=deng1 mei6|ci=tɛŋ mei|mc=tæŋ mei|oc-bs=tæŋ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Goat also known as Teibi''' (丁未) (ひのとひつじ、ていかのひつじ、ていび) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 44th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wushen|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Goat (丁未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: teibi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongmi (정미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Fire Goat (丁未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: ひのとひつじ (hinoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: ていかのひつじ (teika-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: ていび (teibi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): jeongmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Fire Goat== A Common Era year that leaves a remainder of 47 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|Year]] of Teibi. {| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Teibi''' |- ! === Events === * The conflict in [[:en:587|587 AD]] between the [[:en:Soga clan|Soga clan]] and the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] is known as the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teibi Rebellion]].
==Months of Yin Fire Goat== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then [[:en:June|June]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Goat== === Day Selection === A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Goat (丁未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: teibi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongmi (정미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mùi

=== Events === * The conflict in [[:en:587|587 AD]] between the [[:en:Soga clan|Soga clan]] and the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] is known as the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teibi Rebellion]].
==Months of Yin Fire Goat== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then [[:en:June|June]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Goat== === Day Selection === A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

=== Events === * The conflict in [[:en:587|587 AD]] between the [[:en:Soga clan|Soga clan]] and the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] is known as the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teibi Rebellion]].
==Months of Yin Fire Goat== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then [[:en:June|June]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Goat== === Day Selection === A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yin Fire Goat== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then [[:en:June|June]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Goat== === Day Selection === A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

=== Events === * The conflict in [[:en:587|587 AD]] between the [[:en:Soga clan|Soga clan]] and the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] is known as the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teibi Rebellion]].
==Months of Yin Fire Goat== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then [[:en:June|June]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Goat== === Day Selection === A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

=== Events === * The conflict in [[:en:587|587 AD]] between the [[:en:Soga clan|Soga clan]] and the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] is known as the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teibi Rebellion]].
==Months of Yin Fire Goat== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then [[:en:June|June]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Goat== === Day Selection === A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yin Fire Goat== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then [[:en:June|June]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Goat== === Day Selection === A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

=== Events === * The conflict in [[:en:587|587 AD]] between the [[:en:Soga clan|Soga clan]] and the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] is known as the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teibi Rebellion]].
==Months of Yin Fire Goat== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then [[:en:June|June]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Goat== === Day Selection === A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-ê]][[de:Feuer-Schaf]][[hak:Tên-vi]][[ja:丁未]][[ko:정미]][[vi:Đinh Mùi]][[za:Dingmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-bī]][[zh-yue:丁未]][[zh:丁未]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q905292]] Wikidata name: Yin Fire Goat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Goat|kanji=丁未|romaji=hinoto hitsuji|onyomi=teibi|p=dīwèi|w=ting-wei|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ weɪ̯|y=deng1 mei6|j=deng1 mei6|ci=tɛŋ mei|mc=tæŋ mei|oc-bs=tæŋ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Goat also known as Teibi''' (丁未) (ひのとひつじ、ていかのひつじ、ていび) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 44th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wushen|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin === Events === * The conflict in [[:en:587|587 AD]] between the [[:en:Soga clan|Soga clan]] and the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] is known as the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teibi Rebellion]].
==Months of Yin Fire Goat== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then [[:en:June|June]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Goat== === Day Selection === A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-ê]][[de:Feuer-Schaf]][[hak:Tên-vi]][[ja:丁未]][[ko:정미]][[vi:Đinh Mùi]][[za:Dingmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-bī]][[zh-yue:丁未]][[zh:丁未]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q905292]] Wikidata name: Yin Fire Goat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Goat|kanji=丁未|romaji=hinoto hitsuji|onyomi=teibi|p=dīwèi|w=ting-wei|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ weɪ̯|y=deng1 mei6|j=deng1 mei6|ci=tɛŋ mei|mc=tæŋ mei|oc-bs=tæŋ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Goat also known as Teibi''' (丁未) (ひのとひつじ、ていかのひつじ、ていび) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 44th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wushen|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Goat (丁未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: teibi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongmi (정미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mùi

It is the 44th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wushen|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Goat (丁未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: teibi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongmi (정미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Fire Goat (丁未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: ひのとひつじ (hinoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: ていかのひつじ (teika-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: ていび (teibi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): jeongmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Fire Goat== A Common Era year that leaves a remainder of 47 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|Year]] of Teibi. {| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Teibi''' |- ! === Events === * The conflict in [[:en:587|587 AD]] between the [[:en:Soga clan|Soga clan]] and the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] is known as the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teibi Rebellion]].
==Months of Yin Fire Goat== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then [[:en:June|June]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Goat== === Day Selection === A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

=== Events === * The conflict in [[:en:587|587 AD]] between the [[:en:Soga clan|Soga clan]] and the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] is known as the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teibi Rebellion]].
==Months of Yin Fire Goat== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then [[:en:June|June]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Goat== === Day Selection === A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yin Fire Goat== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then [[:en:June|June]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Goat== === Day Selection === A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

=== Events === * The conflict in [[:en:587|587 AD]] between the [[:en:Soga clan|Soga clan]] and the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] is known as the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teibi Rebellion]].
==Months of Yin Fire Goat== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then [[:en:June|June]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Goat== === Day Selection === A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

=== Events === * The conflict in [[:en:587|587 AD]] between the [[:en:Soga clan|Soga clan]] and the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] is known as the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teibi Rebellion]].
==Months of Yin Fire Goat== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then [[:en:June|June]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Goat== === Day Selection === A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-ê]][[de:Feuer-Schaf]][[hak:Tên-vi]][[ja:丁未]][[ko:정미]][[vi:Đinh Mùi]][[za:Dingmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-bī]][[zh-yue:丁未]][[zh:丁未]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q905292]] Wikidata name: Yin Fire Goat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Goat|kanji=丁未|romaji=hinoto hitsuji|onyomi=teibi|p=dīwèi|w=ting-wei|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ weɪ̯|y=deng1 mei6|j=deng1 mei6|ci=tɛŋ mei|mc=tæŋ mei|oc-bs=tæŋ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Goat also known as Teibi''' (丁未) (ひのとひつじ、ていかのひつじ、ていび) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 44th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wushen|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire Generation|lt_ja=相生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Fire generates Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Goat (丁未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: teibi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongmi (정미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mùi

=== Events === * The conflict in [[:en:587|587 AD]] between the [[:en:Soga clan|Soga clan]] and the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] is known as the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teibi Rebellion]].
==Months of Yin Fire Goat== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then [[:en:June|June]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Goat== === Day Selection === A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

=== Events === * The conflict in [[:en:587|587 AD]] between the [[:en:Soga clan|Soga clan]] and the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] is known as the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teibi Rebellion]].
==Months of Yin Fire Goat== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then [[:en:June|June]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Goat== === Day Selection === A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-ê]][[de:Feuer-Schaf]][[hak:Tên-vi]][[ja:丁未]][[ko:정미]][[vi:Đinh Mùi]][[za:Dingmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-bī]][[zh-yue:丁未]][[zh:丁未]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q905292]] Wikidata name: Yin Fire Goat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Goat|kanji=丁未|romaji=hinoto hitsuji|onyomi=teibi|p=dīwèi|w=ting-wei|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ weɪ̯|y=deng1 mei6|j=deng1 mei6|ci=tɛŋ mei|mc=tæŋ mei|oc-bs=tæŋ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Goat also known as Teibi''' (丁未) (ひのとひつじ、ていかのひつじ、ていび) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 44th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wushen|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو === Events === * The conflict in [[:en:587|587 AD]] between the [[:en:Soga clan|Soga clan]] and the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] is known as the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teibi Rebellion]].
==Months of Yin Fire Goat== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then [[:en:June|June]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Goat== === Day Selection === A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 44th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wushen|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin === Events === * The conflict in [[:en:587|587 AD]] between the [[:en:Soga clan|Soga clan]] and the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] is known as the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teibi Rebellion]].
==Months of Yin Fire Goat== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then [[:en:June|June]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Goat== === Day Selection === A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

=== Events === * The conflict in [[:en:587|587 AD]] between the [[:en:Soga clan|Soga clan]] and the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] is known as the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teibi Rebellion]].
==Months of Yin Fire Goat== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then [[:en:June|June]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Goat== === Day Selection === A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Goat== === Day Selection === A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

=== Events === * The conflict in [[:en:587|587 AD]] between the [[:en:Soga clan|Soga clan]] and the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] is known as the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teibi Rebellion]].
==Months of Yin Fire Goat== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then [[:en:June|June]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Goat== === Day Selection === A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 44th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wushen|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin === Events === * The conflict in [[:en:587|587 AD]] between the [[:en:Soga clan|Soga clan]] and the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] is known as the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teibi Rebellion]].
==Months of Yin Fire Goat== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then [[:en:June|June]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Goat== === Day Selection === A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 44th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wushen|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Goat== === Day Selection === A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

=== Events === * The conflict in [[:en:587|587 AD]] between the [[:en:Soga clan|Soga clan]] and the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] is known as the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teibi Rebellion]].
==Months of Yin Fire Goat== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then [[:en:June|June]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Goat== === Day Selection === A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

=== Events === * The conflict in [[:en:587|587 AD]] between the [[:en:Soga clan|Soga clan]] and the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] is known as the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teibi Rebellion]].
==Months of Yin Fire Goat== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then [[:en:June|June]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Goat== === Day Selection === A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 44th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wushen|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin === Events === * The conflict in [[:en:587|587 AD]] between the [[:en:Soga clan|Soga clan]] and the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] is known as the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teibi Rebellion]].
==Months of Yin Fire Goat== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then [[:en:June|June]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Goat== === Day Selection === A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 44th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wushen|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto ==Days of Yin Fire Goat== === Day Selection === A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

=== Events === * The conflict in [[:en:587|587 AD]] between the [[:en:Soga clan|Soga clan]] and the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] is known as the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teibi Rebellion]].
==Months of Yin Fire Goat== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then [[:en:June|June]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.

=== Events === * The conflict in [[:en:587|587 AD]] between the [[:en:Soga clan|Soga clan]] and the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] is known as the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teibi Rebellion]].
==Months of Yin Fire Goat== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then [[:en:June|June]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Goat== === Day Selection === A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Fire Goat also known as  Teibi''' (丁未) (ひのとひつじ、ていかのひつじ、ていび) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 44th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wushen|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire === Events ===
* The conflict in {{ill|587|en|587|WD=Q30891|lt=587 AD}} between the {{ill|Soga clan|en|Soga clan|WD=Q909854|lt=Soga clan}} and the {{ill|Mononobe clan|en|Mononobe clan|WD=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe clan}} is known as the {{ill|Soga–Mononobe conflict|en|Soga–Mononobe conflict|WD=Q534720|lt=Teibi Rebellion}}.

==Months of Yin Fire Goat==
In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then {{ill|June|en|June|WD=Q120|lt=June}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Shōsho}} until the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Rittō}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Goat==
=== Day Selection ===
A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Fire Goat also known as  Teibi''' (丁未) (ひのとひつじ、ていかのひつじ、ていび) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 44th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wushen|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches}}’ {{ill|Mei|ja|未|1=wèi|lt=Goat (未)|2=ja|3=未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mei|13=User:Immanuelle/Goat (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and they interact by {{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|lt=Mutual Generation|lt_ja=相生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual === Events ===
* The conflict in {{ill|587|en|587|WD=Q30891|lt=587 AD}} between the {{ill|Soga clan|en|Soga clan|WD=Q909854|lt=Soga clan}} and the {{ill|Mononobe clan|en|Mononobe clan|WD=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe clan}} is known as the {{ill|Soga–Mononobe conflict|en|Soga–Mononobe conflict|WD=Q534720|lt=Teibi Rebellion}}.

==Months of Yin Fire Goat==
In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then {{ill|June|en|June|WD=Q120|lt=June}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Shōsho}} until the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Rittō}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Goat==
=== Day Selection ===
A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Fire Goat also known as  Teibi''' (丁未) (ひのとひつじ、ていかのひつじ、ていび) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 44th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wushen|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Goat|kanji=丁未|romaji=hinoto hitsuji|onyomi=teibi|p=dīwèi|w=ting-wei|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ weɪ̯|y=deng1 mei6|j=deng1 mei6|ci=tɛŋ mei|mc=tæŋ mei|oc-bs=tæŋ mei|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Fire Goat also known as  Teibi''' (丁未) (ひのとひつじ、ていかのひつじ、ていび) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 44th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wushen|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches}}’ {{ill|Mei|ja|未|1=wèi|lt=Goat (未)|2=ja|3=未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mei|13=User:Immanuelle/Goat (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and they interact by {{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|lt=Mutual Generation|lt_ja=相生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Fire generates Earth).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Fire Goat (丁未)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-hitsuji
***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-hitsuji
***Onyomi 1: teibi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongmi (정미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mùi

==Years of Yin Fire Goat==
A Common Era year that leaves a remainder of 47 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=Year}} of Teibi.
