=== Events ===
* The conflict in {{ill|587|en|587|WD=Q30891|lt=587 AD}} between the {{ill|Soga clan|en|Soga clan|WD=Q909854|lt=Soga clan}} and the {{ill|Mononobe clan|en|Mononobe clan|WD=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe clan}} is known as the {{ill|Soga–Mononobe conflict|en|Soga–Mononobe conflict|WD=Q534720|lt=Teibi Rebellion}}.

==Months of Yin Fire Goat==
In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then {{ill|June|en|June|WD=Q120|lt=June}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Shōsho}} until the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Rittō}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Goat==
=== Day Selection ===
A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yin Fire Goat also known as  Teibi''' (丁未) (ひのとひつじ、ていかのひつじ、ていび) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 44th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wushen|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Fire Goat (丁未)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-hitsuji
***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-hitsuji
***Onyomi 1: teibi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongmi (정미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mùi

=== Events ===
* The conflict in {{ill|587|en|587|WD=Q30891|lt=587 AD}} between the {{ill|Soga clan|en|Soga clan|WD=Q909854|lt=Soga clan}} and the {{ill|Mononobe clan|en|Mononobe clan|WD=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe clan}} is known as the {{ill|Soga–Mononobe conflict|en|Soga–Mononobe conflict|WD=Q534720|lt=Teibi Rebellion}}.

==Months of Yin Fire Goat==
In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then {{ill|June|en|June|WD=Q120|lt=June}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Shōsho}} until the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Rittō}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Goat==
=== Day Selection ===
A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

=== Events ===
* The conflict in {{ill|587|en|587|WD=Q30891|lt=587 AD|1=587}} between the {{ill|Soga clan|en|Soga clan|WD=Q909854|lt=Soga clan|1=Soga clan}} and the {{ill|Mononobe clan|en|Mononobe clan|WD=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe clan|1=Mononobe clan}} is known as the {{ill|Soga–Mononobe conflict|en|Soga–Mononobe conflict|WD=Q534720|lt=Teibi Rebellion|1=Soga–Mononobe conflict}}.

==Months of Yin Fire Goat==
In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then {{ill|June|en|June|WD=Q120|lt=June|1=June}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Shōsho|1=Xiaoshu}} until the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Rittō|1=Liqiu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Goat==
=== Day Selection ===
A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yin Fire Goat also known as  Teibi''' (丁未) (ひのとひつじ、ていかのひつじ、ていび) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 44th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wushen|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto === Events ===
* The conflict in {{ill|587|en|587|WD=Q30891|lt=587 AD|1=587}} between the {{ill|Soga clan|en|Soga clan|WD=Q909854|lt=Soga clan|1=Soga clan}} and the {{ill|Mononobe clan|en|Mononobe clan|WD=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe clan|1=Mononobe clan}} is known as the {{ill|Soga–Mononobe conflict|en|Soga–Mononobe conflict|WD=Q534720|lt=Teibi Rebellion|1=Soga–Mononobe conflict}}.

==Months of Yin Fire Goat==
In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then {{ill|June|en|June|WD=Q120|lt=June|1=June}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Shōsho|1=Xiaoshu}} until the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Rittō|1=Liqiu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Goat==
=== Day Selection ===
A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yin Fire Goat also known as  Teibi''' (丁未) (ひのとひつじ、ていかのひつじ、ていび) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 44th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wushen|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto === Events ===
* The conflict in {{ill|587|en|587|WD=Q30891|lt=587 AD|1=587}} between the {{ill|Soga clan|en|Soga clan|WD=Q909854|lt=Soga clan|1=Soga clan}} and the {{ill|Mononobe clan|en|Mononobe clan|WD=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe clan|1=Mononobe clan}} is known as the {{ill|Soga–Mononobe conflict|en|Soga–Mononobe conflict|WD=Q534720|lt=Teibi Rebellion|1=Soga–Mononobe conflict}}.

==Months of Yin Fire Goat==
In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then {{ill|June|en|June|WD=Q120|lt=June|1=June}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Shōsho|1=Xiaoshu}} until the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Rittō|1=Liqiu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Goat==
=== Day Selection ===
A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Goat|kanji=丁未|romaji=hinoto hitsuji|onyomi=teibi|p=dīwèi|w=ting-wei|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ weɪ̯|y=deng1 mei6|j=deng1 mei6|ci=tɛŋ mei|mc=tæŋ mei|oc-bs=tæŋ mei|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Fire Goat also known as  Teibi''' (丁未) (ひのとひつじ、ていかのひつじ、ていび) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 44th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wushen|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (未)|2=ja|3=未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mei|13=User:Immanuelle/Goat (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20128396}} represents yin Generation|lt_ja=相生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Fire generates Earth).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Fire Goat (丁未)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-hitsuji
***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-hitsuji
***Onyomi 1: teibi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongmi (정미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mùi

* The conflict in {{ill|587|en|587|WD=Q30891|lt=587 AD|1=587}} between the {{ill|Soga clan|en|Soga clan|WD=Q909854|lt=Soga clan|1=Soga clan}} and the {{ill|Mononobe clan|en|Mononobe clan|WD=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe clan|1=Mononobe clan}} is known as the {{ill|Soga–Mononobe conflict|en|Soga–Mononobe conflict|WD=Q534720|lt=Teibi Rebellion|1=Soga–Mononobe conflict}}.

==Months of Yin Fire Goat==
In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then {{ill|June|en|June|WD=Q120|lt=June|1=June}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Shōsho|1=Xiaoshu}} until the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Rittō|1=Liqiu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Goat==
=== Day Selection ===
A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.
